name: Anhui Zhongding Sealing Parts Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Zhongding Sealing Parts Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells non-tire rubber products in China and internationally. The company offers sealing products, including O-rings, gaskets, and encoders, as well as oil, mechanic, bearing, PTFE, special, and air spring seals; and anti-vibration control technologies, such as engine and top mounts, chassis and torque bushings, exhaust hangers, dampers, stabilized bar bushings, spring pads, bumpers, and radiator isolators. It also provides fluid management solutions comprising power steering, cooling system, fuel system, clean system, and drainage pipes, as well as air intake and exhaust ducts; metal products, including stamping and casting aluminum products, and metal pipes; customized products for transportation, household, and other industries; and air beds. In addition, the company offers charging piles, cooling systems, and gas purifying equipment for new energy vehicles. It serves automotive, construction machinery, petrochemical processing, office automation, railway, and shipping industries primarily under the Dinghu brand name. Anhui Zhongding Sealing Parts Co., Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is based in Ningguo, China.
